name: COMPEX ACTIV'® ARM SUPPORT SLEEVES
description_html: Compex Activ'® Arm Compression Sleeves: are lightweight and breathable. They provide a second-skin feel for comfortable support during exercise and training.

name: COMPEX ACTIV'® BACK SUPPORT BELT
description_html: Compex Activ'® Belt is a comfortable low back support with adjustable elastic straps for compression and improved proprioception control during activity.

name: COMPEX ACTIV'® CALF SUPPORT SLEEVES
description_html: Compex Activ'® Calf Support Sleeves boast seamless design and second-skin comfort that provides support and boosts proprioception without restricting movement.

name: COMPEX ACTIV'® PATELLA SUPPORT STRAP
description_html: Compex Activ'® Patella Strap foam insert eases strain on the patella tendon, while the adjustable strap lets you customize compression during exercise.

name: COMPEX ACTIV'® WRIST BAND+ SUPPORT
description_html: The Compex Activ'® Wrist Band+ Support boasts an adjustable elastic strap, allowing you to control the amount of compression on your wrist during exercise.

name: COMPEX ACTIV'® WRIST+ SUPPORT
description_html: Compex Activ'® Wrist+ provides comfortable wrist and hand support with adjustable compression and thumb mobility for optimal performance and proprioception.

name: COMPEX ACTIV’® ANKLE SUPPORT
description_html: Compex Activ'® Ankle provides support with a compressive second-skin design, ensuring stability while allowing optimal range of motion and proprioception.

name: COMPEX ACTIV’® ANKLE+ SUPPORT
description_html: Compex Activ'® Ankle+ offers excellent ankle support with its figure-8 strap system, allowing unrestricted movement and improved proprioception.

name: COMPEX ACTIV’® KNEE SUPPORTS
description_html: Compex Activ'® Knee provides seamless, unrestricted support with second-skin comfort. This proproceptive support is ideal for wear during exercise.

name: COMPEX ACTIV’® KNEE+ SUPPORT
description_html: Experience extra support with Compex Activ'® Knee+. Its user-friendly cross-over straps provide added stability, boosting your confidence and proprioception.

name: COMPEX AYRE™ COMPRESSION BOOTS
description_html: Compex Ayre™ boots use cutting edge pressotherapy technology that helps to alleviate heavy legs, improve muscle relaxation and boost lymphatic drainage.

name: COMPEX AYRE™ PRO COMPRESSION BOOTS
description_html: Designed for coaches, elite and recreational athletes on-the-go, Ayre™ Pro compression boots use pressotherapy to enable faster muscle recovery after exercise.

name: COMPEX BACK PAIN PACK
description_html: The Compex Back Pain Pack includes a Compex ComfortTENS Back™ wrap for pain relief and a Compex Activ' Belt support for your lower back during activity.

name: COMPEX COREBELT 5.0 EMS MUSCLE STIMULATOR BELT
description_html: The Compex Corebelt 5.0 electrical muscle stimulation (EMS) belt will sculpt and tone your abs and offers back massage, helping improve your posture and wellness.
